description: JotLuck offline autocomplete baseline corpus configuration

hardcodedFormatRules.description: P0 Markdown structural rules. Language habits still come from corpus.

sources.description: Lightweight Chinese prose for natural phrasing only; not long-form narrative.
Chinese technical notes, bug analysis, architecture notes, release and config writing.
English programming docs, kept lower to avoid cross-language bleed.
High-value English software development note patterns; intentionally boosted to reduce generic web English drift.
Focused English debugging note anchors; boosted so useful software phrases survive web-local pruning.
Focused English release and project status phrases for quiet software-note completion.
Focused English software-note anchors for review, implementation, validation, and quality reports.
Markdown list, table, quote, and task structures.
Realistic short-note corpus: daily notes, meeting notes, project logs, book notes, task lists.
Project documents, very low weight to avoid spec-like prose dominating notes.
Project specs, very low weight to keep baseline note-like.
